content.text:
`GitUser\usr\bin` と `GitUser\mingw64\bin` が除去され、`GitUser\cmd`（gitコマンド）だけ残っています。

これで install-watchdog.ps1 の dlltool shim 回避策も不要になったので、スクリプトをシンプルに戻してからクリーンビルドで最終確認します。

content.content:
1→Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
     2→$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
     3→
     4→$scriptDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
     5→$crateDir = Join-Path $scriptDir "watchdog-rs"
     6→$publishDir = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA "EspansoWatchdog"
     7→$taskName = "EspansoWatchdog"
     8→
     9→if (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $crateDir "Cargo.toml"))) {
    10→  throw "Cargo.toml not found: $crateDir"
    11→}
    12→
    13→Write-Host "[1/5] stop existing watchdog process..."
    14→$existing = Get-Process -Name "EspansoWatchdog" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    15→if ($existing) {
    16→  $existing | Stop-Process -Force
    17→  Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
    18→}
    19→
    20→Write-Host "[2/5] cargo build --release..."
    21→Push-Location $crateDir
    22→try {
    23→  $savedPath = $env:PATH
    24→
    25→  # Ensure cargo is in PATH
    26→  $cargoDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".cargo\bin"
    27→  if ($env:PATH -notlike "*$cargoDir*") {
    28→    $env:PATH = "$cargoDir;$env:PATH"
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  # Replace Git-bundled dlltool (broken with MSVC) with msys64 mingw64 one.
    32→  # We copy only dlltool.exe to a temp dir to avoid pulling in other GNU tools
    33→  # that would cause rustc to select the wrong target variant.
    34→  $dlltoolTmp = $null
    35→  $mingwDlltool = "C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\dlltool.exe"
    36→  if (Test-Path $mingwDlltool) {
    37→    $dlltoolTmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "rust-dlltool-shim"
    38→    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dlltoolTmp -Force | Out-Null
    39→    $mingwBin = Split-Path $mingwDlltool
    40→    Copy-Item $mingwDlltool (Join-Path $dlltoolTmp "dlltool.exe") -Force
    41→    # Copy required DLL dependencies
    42→    # as.exe is invoked by dlltool internally
    43→    foreach ($dll in @("as.exe","zlib1.dll","libwinpthread-1.dll","libintl-8.dll","libzstd.dll","libiconv-2.dll")) {
    44→      $src = Join-Path $mingwBin $dll
    45→      if (Test-Path $src) { Copy-Item $src $dlltoolTmp -Force }
    46→    }
    47→    $filtered = ($env:PATH -split ';' |
    48→      Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'GitUser\\usr\\bin' }) -join ';'
    49→    $env:PATH = "$dlltoolTmp;$filtered"
    50→  } else {
    51→    $env:PATH = ($env:PATH -split ';' |
    52→      Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'GitUser\\usr\\bin' }) -join ';'
    53→  }
    54→
    55→  $prevEAP = $ErrorActionPreference
    56→  $ErrorActionPreference = "Continue"
    57→  cargo build --release
    58→  $ErrorActionPreference = $prevEAP
    59→
    60→  $env:PATH = $savedPath
    61→  if ($dlltoolTmp) { Remove-Item $dlltoolTmp -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
    62→
    63→  if ($LASTEXITCODE -and $LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "cargo build failed (exit=$LASTEXITCODE)" }
    64→} finally {
    65→  Pop-Location
    66→}
    67→
    68→Write-Host "[3/5] copy binary..."
    69→if (-not (Test-Path $publishDir)) {
    70→  New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $publishDir | Out-Null
    71→}
    72→Copy-Item (Join-Path $crateDir "target\release\EspansoWatchdog.exe") $publishDir -Force
    73→
    74→$exePath = Join-Path $publishDir "EspansoWatchdog.exe"
    75→if (-not (Test-Path $exePath)) {
    76→  throw "Watchdog exe not found after build: $exePath"
    77→}
    78→
    79→Write-Host "[4/5] register scheduled task..."
    80→
    81→# Remove old startup shortcut if exists (migration)
    82→$startupDir = [Environment]::GetFolderPath("Startup")
    83→$oldShortcut = Join-Path $startupDir "EspansoWatchdog.lnk"
    84→if (Test-Path $oldShortcut) {
    85→  Remove-Item $oldShortcut -Force
    86→  Write-Host "  removed old startup shortcut."
    87→}
    88→
    89→# Unregister existing task before re-registering
    90→Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName $taskName -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    91→
    92→$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute $exePath -WorkingDirectory $publishDir
    93→
    94→# Trigger 1: At logon (current user)
    95→$triggerLogon = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogOn
    96→$triggerLogon.UserId = [System.Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent().Name
    97→
    98→# Trigger 2: On sleep resume (Power-Troubleshooter EventID=1)
    99→$CIMClass = Get-CimClass -ClassName MSFT_TaskEventTrigger -Namespace Root/Microsoft/Windows/TaskScheduler
   100→$triggerResume = New-CimInstance -CimClass $CIMClass -ClientOnly
   101→$triggerResume.Subscription = @'
   102→<QueryList><Query Id="0" Path="System"><Select Path="System">*[System[Provider[@Name="Microsoft-Windows-Power-Troubleshooter"] and EventID=1]]</Select></Query></QueryList>
   103→'@
   104→$triggerResume.Enabled = $true
   105→
   106→$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet `
   107→  -AllowStartIfOnBatteries `
   108→  -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries `
   109→  -MultipleInstances IgnoreNew `
   110→  -Priority 3
   111→
   112→Register-ScheduledTask `
   113→  -TaskName $taskName `
   114→  -Action $action `
   115→  -Trigger @($triggerLogon, $triggerResume) `
   116→  -Settings $settings `
   117→  -Description "Espanso watchdog - monitors and restarts espanso"
   118→
   119→Write-Host "[5/5] run health check once & start..."
   120→$onceProc = Start-Process -FilePath $exePath -ArgumentList "--once" -WorkingDirectory $publishDir -PassThru
   121→$onceProc.WaitForExit(120000) | Out-Null
   122→if ($onceProc.ExitCode -ne 0) {
   123→  throw "Watchdog --once failed (exit=$($onceProc.ExitCode)). Check $publishDir\watchdog.log"
   124→}
   125→
   126→# Start via scheduled task so it inherits Priority 3 (High) setting
   127→Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName $taskName
   128→
   129→Write-Host "Install completed."
   130→Write-Host "Scheduled task: $taskName"
   131→Write-Host "Log file: $publishDir\watchdog.log"
   132→

file.content:
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$scriptDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
$crateDir = Join-Path $scriptDir "watchdog-rs"
$publishDir = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA "EspansoWatchdog"
$taskName = "EspansoWatchdog"

if (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $crateDir "Cargo.toml"))) {
  throw "Cargo.toml not found: $crateDir"
}

Write-Host "[1/5] stop existing watchdog process..."
$existing = Get-Process -Name "EspansoWatchdog" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if ($existing) {
  $existing | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
}

Write-Host "[2/5] cargo build --release..."
Push-Location $crateDir
try {
  $savedPath = $env:PATH

  # Ensure cargo is in PATH
  $cargoDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".cargo\bin"
  if ($env:PATH -notlike "*$cargoDir*") {
    $env:PATH = "$cargoDir;$env:PATH"
  }

  # Replace Git-bundled dlltool (broken with MSVC) with msys64 mingw64 one.
  # We copy only dlltool.exe to a temp dir to avoid pulling in other GNU tools
  # that would cause rustc to select the wrong target variant.
  $dlltoolTmp = $null
  $mingwDlltool = "C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\dlltool.exe"
  if (Test-Path $mingwDlltool) {
    $dlltoolTmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "rust-dlltool-shim"
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dlltoolTmp -Force | Out-Null
    $mingwBin = Split-Path $mingwDlltool
    Copy-Item $mingwDlltool (Join-Path $dlltoolTmp "dlltool.exe") -Force
    # Copy required DLL dependencies
    # as.exe is invoked by dlltool internally
    foreach ($dll in @("as.exe","zlib1.dll","libwinpthread-1.dll","libintl-8.dll","libzstd.dll","libiconv-2.dll")) {
      $src = Join-Path $mingwBin $dll
      if (Test-Path $src) { Copy-Item $src $dlltoolTmp -Force }
    }
    $filtered = ($env:PATH -split ';' |
      Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'GitUser\\usr\\bin' }) -join ';'
    $env:PATH = "$dlltoolTmp;$filtered"
  } else {
    $env:PATH = ($env:PATH -split ';' |
      Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'GitUser\\usr\\bin' }) -join ';'
  }

  $prevEAP = $ErrorActionPreference
  $ErrorActionPreference = "Continue"
  cargo build --release
  $ErrorActionPreference = $prevEAP

  $env:PATH = $savedPath
  if ($dlltoolTmp) { Remove-Item $dlltoolTmp -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

  if ($LASTEXITCODE -and $LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "cargo build failed (exit=$LASTEXITCODE)" }
} finally {
  Pop-Location
}

Write-Host "[3/5] copy binary..."
if (-not (Test-Path $publishDir)) {
  New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $publishDir | Out-Null
}
Copy-Item (Join-Path $crateDir "target\release\EspansoWatchdog.exe") $publishDir -Force

$exePath = Join-Path $publishDir "EspansoWatchdog.exe"
if (-not (Test-Path $exePath)) {
  throw "Watchdog exe not found after build: $exePath"
}

Write-Host "[4/5] register scheduled task..."

# Remove old startup shortcut if exists (migration)
$startupDir = [Environment]::GetFolderPath("Startup")
$oldShortcut = Join-Path $startupDir "EspansoWatchdog.lnk"
if (Test-Path $oldShortcut) {
  Remove-Item $oldShortcut -Force
  Write-Host "  removed old startup shortcut."
}

# Unregister existing task before re-registering
Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName $taskName -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute $exePath -WorkingDirectory $publishDir

# Trigger 1: At logon (current user)
$triggerLogon = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogOn
$triggerLogon.UserId = [System.Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent().Name

# Trigger 2: On sleep resume (Power-Troubleshooter EventID=1)
$CIMClass = Get-CimClass -ClassName MSFT_TaskEventTrigger -Namespace Root/Microsoft/Windows/TaskScheduler
$triggerResume = New-CimInstance -CimClass $CIMClass -ClientOnly
$triggerResume.Subscription = @'
<QueryList><Query Id="0" Path="System"><Select Path="System">*[System[Provider[@Name="Microsoft-Windows-Power-Troubleshooter"] and EventID=1]]</Select></Query></QueryList>
'@
$triggerResume.Enabled = $true

$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet `
  -AllowStartIfOnBatteries `
  -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries `
  -MultipleInstances IgnoreNew `
  -Priority 3

Register-ScheduledTask `
  -TaskName $taskName `
  -Action $action `
  -Trigger @($triggerLogon, $triggerResume) `
  -Settings $settings `
  -Description "Espanso watchdog - monitors and restarts espanso"

Write-Host "[5/5] run health check once & start..."
$onceProc = Start-Process -FilePath $exePath -ArgumentList "--once" -WorkingDirectory $publishDir -PassThru
$onceProc.WaitForExit(120000) | Out-Null
if ($onceProc.ExitCode -ne 0) {
  throw "Watchdog --once failed (exit=$($onceProc.ExitCode)). Check $publishDir\watchdog.log"
}

# Start via scheduled task so it inherits Priority 3 (High) setting
Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName $taskName

Write-Host "Install completed."
Write-Host "Scheduled task: $taskName"
Write-Host "Log file: $publishDir\watchdog.log"

Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$scriptDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
$crateDir = Join-Path $scriptDir "watchdog-rs"
$publishDir = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA "EspansoWatchdog"
$taskName = "EspansoWatchdog"

if (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $crateDir "Cargo.toml"))) {

}

if ($existing) {
  $existing | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
}

content.text:
System PATHの変更はレジストリには反映されていますが、現在のシェルプロセスには古いPATHが引き継がれています。**新しいPowerShellウィンドウ**を開くか、現在のセッションのPATHをリフレッシュする必要があります。

install-watchdog.ps1 にセッション中のPATHをリフレッシュする処理を入れるのが確実です。

file.content:
Write-Host "[2/5] cargo build --release..."
Push-Location $crateDir
try {
  # Ensure cargo is in PATH
  $savedPath = $env:PATH
  $cargoDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".cargo\bin"
  if ($env:PATH -notlike "*$cargoDir*") {
    $env:PATH = "$cargoDir;$env:PATH"
  }

  $prevEAP = $ErrorActionPreference
  $ErrorActionPreference = "Continue"
  cargo build --release
  $ErrorActionPreference = $prevEAP

  $env:PATH = $savedPath

  if ($LASTEXITCODE -and $LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "cargo build failed (exit=$LASTEXITCODE)" }

input.new_string:
# Rebuild PATH from registry to pick up any recent changes, then ensure cargo is in it
  $machinePath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH', 'Machine')
  $userPath    = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH', 'User')
  $env:PATH = "$userPath;$machinePath"

  $cargoDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".cargo\bin"
  if ($env:PATH -notlike "*$cargoDir*") {
    $env:PATH = "$cargoDir;$env:PATH"
  }

toolUseResult.newString:
# Rebuild PATH from registry to pick up any recent changes, then ensure cargo is in it
  $machinePath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH', 'Machine')
  $userPath    = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH', 'User')
  $env:PATH = "$userPath;$machinePath"

  $cargoDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".cargo\bin"
  if ($env:PATH -notlike "*$cargoDir*") {
    $env:PATH = "$cargoDir;$env:PATH"
  }
toolUseResult.originalFile:
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$scriptDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
$crateDir = Join-Path $scriptDir "watchdog-rs"
$publishDir = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA "EspansoWatchdog"
$taskName = "EspansoWatchdog"

if (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $crateDir "Cargo.toml"))) {
  throw "Cargo.toml not found: $crateDir"
}

Write-Host "[1/5] stop existing watchdog process..."
$existing = Get-Process -Name "EspansoWatchdog" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if ($existing) {
  $existing | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
}

Write-Host "[2/5] cargo build --release..."
Push-Location $crateDir
try {
  # Ensure cargo is in PATH
  $savedPath = $env:PATH
  $cargoDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".cargo\bin"
  if ($env:PATH -notlike "*$cargoDir*") {
    $env:PATH = "$cargoDir;$env:PATH"
  }

  $prevEAP = $ErrorActionPreference
  $ErrorActionPreference = "Continue"
  cargo build --release
  $ErrorActionPreference = $prevEAP

  $env:PATH = $savedPath

  if ($LASTEXITCODE -and $LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "cargo build failed (exit=$LASTEXITCODE)" }
} finally {
  Pop-Location
}

Write-Host "[3/5] copy binary..."
if (-not (Test-Path $publishDir)) {
  New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $publishDir | Out-Null
}
Copy-Item (Join-Path $crateDir "target\release\EspansoWatchdog.exe") $publishDir -Force

$exePath = Join-Path $publishDir "EspansoWatchdog.exe"
if (-not (Test-Path $exePath)) {
  throw "Watchdog exe not found after build: $exePath"
}

Write-Host "[4/5] register scheduled task..."

# Remove old startup shortcut if exists (migration)
$startupDir = [Environment]::GetFolderPath("Startup")
$oldShortcut = Join-Path $startupDir "EspansoWatchdog.lnk"
if (Test-Path $oldShortcut) {
  Remove-Item $oldShortcut -Force
  Write-Host "  removed old startup shortcut."
}

# Unregister existing task before re-registering
Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName $taskName -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute $exePath -WorkingDirectory $publishDir

# Trigger 1: At logon (current user)
$triggerLogon = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogOn
$triggerLogon.UserId = [System.Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent().Name

# Trigger 2: On sleep resume (Power-Troubleshooter EventID=1)
$CIMClass = Get-CimClass -ClassName MSFT_TaskEventTrigger -Namespace Root/Microsoft/Windows/TaskScheduler
$triggerResume = New-CimInstance -CimClass $CIMClass -ClientOnly
$triggerResume.Subscription = @'
<QueryList><Query Id="0" Path="System"><Select Path="System">*[System[Provider[@Name="Microsoft-Windows-Power-Troubleshooter"] and EventID=1]]</Select></Query></QueryList>
'@
$triggerResume.Enabled = $true

$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet `
  -AllowStartIfOnBatteries `
  -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries `
  -MultipleInstances IgnoreNew `
  -Priority 3

Register-ScheduledTask `
  -TaskName $taskName `
  -Action $action `
  -Trigger @($triggerLogon, $triggerResume) `
  -Settings $settings `
  -Description "Espanso watchdog - monitors and restarts espanso"

Write-Host "[5/5] run health check once & start..."
$onceProc = Start-Process -FilePath $exePath -ArgumentList "--once" -WorkingDirectory $publishDir -PassThru
$onceProc.WaitForExit(120000) | Out-Null
if ($onceProc.ExitCode -ne 0) {
  throw "Watchdog --once failed (exit=$($onceProc.ExitCode)). Check $publishDir\watchdog.log"
}

# Start via scheduled task so it inherits Priority 3 (High) setting
Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName $taskName

Write-Host "Install completed."
Write-Host "Scheduled task: $taskName"
Write-Host "Log file: $publishDir\watchdog.log"

$triggerResume = New-CimInstance -CimClass $CIMClass -ClientOnly
$triggerResume.Subscription = @'
<QueryList><Query Id="0" Path="System"><Select Path="System">*[System[Provider[@Name="Microsoft-Windows-Power-Troubleshooter"] and EventID=1]]</Select></Query></QueryList>
'@
$triggerResume.Enabled = $true

$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet `
  -AllowStartIfOnBatteries `
  -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries `
  -MultipleInstances IgnoreNew `
  -Priority 3

Register-ScheduledTask `
  -TaskName $taskName `
  -Action $action `
  -Trigger @($triggerLogon, $triggerResume) `
  -Settings $settings `
  -Description "Espanso watchdog - monitors and restarts espanso"

Write-Host "[5/5] run health check once & start..."
$onceProc = Start-Process -FilePath $exePath -ArgumentList "--once" -WorkingDirectory $publishDir -PassThru
$onceProc.WaitForExit(120000) | Out-Null
if ($onceProc.ExitCode -ne 0) {
  throw "Watchdog --once failed (exit=$($onceProc.ExitCode)). Check $publishDir\watchdog.log"
}

# Start via scheduled task so it inherits Priority 3 (High) setting
Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName $taskName

Write-Host "Install completed."
Write-Host "Scheduled task: $taskName"
Write-Host "Log file: $publishDir\watchdog.log"

content.text:
すべて正常。

- System PATHから `GitUser\usr\bin` と `GitUser\mingw64\bin` を除去済み
- `GitUser\cmd`（git コマンド）は残っている
- ビルド成功、watchdog は **Priority: High** で稼働中
- install-watchdog.ps1 はシンプルになり、dlltool shim 不要
